Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Hallow Divide]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Hallow Divide is a weapon held by Aila Escalon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Hallow Divide is a defensive Combat Art used by Omega’s daughter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Hallow Divide projects circular shields around Aila.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — The other copies of Hallow Divide have disappeared.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Hallow Divide is a Zenith Device that has buried World Spirits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — Hallow Divide is a character who projects a digital face from orange light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — Hallow Divide may develop the ability to sever contracts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — Hallow Divide is the Zenith Blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — Hallow Divide declares that a strong Aether is good for the health of the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 34''' — Hallow Divide is a territory where the champions of Horizon fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Hallow Divide is a devastating Combat Art used by Aila Escalon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Hallow Divide may be able to sustain Combat Arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 45''' — Hallow Divide is a technique that can stop Shyrax's attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Hallow Divide is a technique used by Aila Escalon to create a cage of orange slashes.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
